nodes.label: Parliament
nodes.description: Authorizes budget and exercises legislative oversight.

nodes.label: Ministry of Finance - Budget Division
nodes.description: Coordinates Union budget allocation framework.

nodes.label: Ministry of Finance - Department of Expenditure
nodes.description: Frames expenditure rules and fund release controls.

nodes.label: Line Ministries
nodes.description: Own schemes and release central shares where applicable.

nodes.label: CAG
nodes.description: Audits and reports on public finance and government accounts.

nodes.label: PAC
nodes.description: Parliamentary public accounts scrutiny.

nodes.label: Consolidated Fund of India
nodes.description: Origin point for Union government money in this simplified model.

nodes.label: Central Scheme Budget Head
nodes.description: Budget head under the relevant line ministry.

nodes.label: State Single Nodal Agency Account
nodes.description: One account per centrally sponsored scheme per state, subject to scheme rules.

nodes.label: Implementing Agencies
nodes.description: District, block, local body, or department units that execute scheme activity.

nodes.label: DRDA / Line Department DDOs
nodes.description: Drawing and disbursing officers or equivalent authorities issuing payment instructions.

nodes.label: Payment Rail - PFMS
nodes.description: Electronic transfer instruction and reconciliation layer.

nodes.label: Beneficiary Bank Account
nodes.description: Recipient account for individual benefit transfers.

nodes.label: Vendor / Contractor Account
nodes.description: Recipient account for works, goods, services, and procurement payments.

nodes.label: Recipient - Citizen
nodes.description: Citizen or household receiving wages, pensions, scholarships, or DBT benefits.

nodes.label: Recipient - Works / Goods / Services
nodes.description: Public value delivered through vendor or contractor channel.

nodes.label: PFMS
nodes.description: Public Financial Management System for allocations, releases, expenditure, payment, reconciliation, and reporting.

nodes.label: SNA / SNA-SPARSH
nodes.description: SNA cash module and just-in-time release workflow for centrally sponsored schemes.

nodes.label: TSA
nodes.description: Treasury Single Account model for central-sector funds.

nodes.label: DBT Bharat
nodes.description: Policy and MIS layer for direct benefit transfers.

nodes.label: Aadhaar Payment Bridge
nodes.description: Aadhaar-to-bank account routing context for bulk credits.

nodes.label: Scheme MIS Systems
nodes.description: Scheme-specific systems carrying beneficiary, work, sanction, and payment data.

nodes.label: GeM
nodes.description: Government e-Marketplace procurement platform.

nodes.label: CPPP / State eProcurement
nodes.description: Tender publication and bidding systems.

nodes.label: Ministerial Staff
nodes.description: Can influence file and tender movement without holding cash custody.

nodes.label: District Magistrate / Collector
nodes.description: Influences district planning, estimates, utilization, and convergence.

nodes.label: BDO / Tehsildar / Patwari
nodes.description: Can affect beneficiary eligibility, measurements, and local verification.

nodes.label: Junior Engineer / Work Inspector
nodes.description: Produces measurement and quality evidence for works.

nodes.label: Executive Engineer
nodes.description: Clears technical bills, supervises works execution, and signs off on contractor payment stages.

nodes.label: Tender Committee Members
nodes.description: Influence technical and financial qualification of vendors.

nodes.label: PFMS Reports
nodes.description: Expenditure, transactions, treasury, and reconciliation reports.

nodes.label: CAG Reports
nodes.description: Audit paragraphs, compliance reports, and performance audit reports.

nodes.label: Scheme Public Data
nodes.description: Public MIS data such as works, muster rolls, sanctions, beneficiaries, and payments.

nodes.label: GeM / Tender Data
nodes.description: Orders, values, vendors, notices, bids, contracts, and procurement metadata.

nodes.label: DPR / Cost Estimate
nodes.description: Detailed Project Report, schedule of rates, technical sanction, and itemized cost estimate for works.

nodes.label: Running Account Bills
nodes.description: Milestone bills, mobilization advances, contractor invoices, and bill clearance records.

nodes.label: Measurement Books
nodes.description: Field measurement records for quantities, stages, and work completion.

nodes.label: Physical Delivery Evidence
nodes.description: Geo-tags, inspection reports, citizen photos, satellite checks, quality tests, and failure records.

nodes.label: RTI / Grievance / Social Audit
nodes.description: Findings, grievances, appeals, replies, and public oversight records.

nodes.label: CAG Audit -> PAC Scrutiny
nodes.description: Audit and parliamentary scrutiny path.

nodes.label: RTI -> Appeal -> CIC/SIC
nodes.description: Right to information request and appeal path.

nodes.label: Grievance Portals
nodes.description: CPGRAMS and state grievance routes.

nodes.label: Social Audit -> Gram Sabha
nodes.description: Community verification and social audit path.
